_comment: Copy relevant entries into .mcp.json. Secrets come from environment variables — load via Doppler, .env, or your CI secret manager.

github._comment: GitHub — PR management, issue tracking, cross-repo file access. INCLUDED in default .mcp.json.

context7._comment: Context7 — library documentation lookups. INCLUDED in default .mcp.json.

vercel._comment: Vercel — deployment management, preview URLs, build logs.

neon._comment: Neon — serverless PostgreSQL. Add NEON_API_KEY to your secrets.

supabase._comment: Supabase — PostgreSQL + auth + storage. Add SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN to your secrets.

doppler._comment: Doppler — secrets management. Add DOPPLER_TOKEN to your secrets.

sentry._comment: Sentry — error tracking and performance monitoring.

browserbase._comment: Browserbase — cloud browser automation for external sites. Stealth mode included.

playwright._comment: Playwright — local browser automation. Works for localhost only (no external sites in sandbox).
